gh pr create *.reason: Allow gh pr create with multi-line body

git commit *.reason: Allow git commit with multi-line messages

gh issue create *.reason: Allow gh issue create with multi-line body

git -C *.suggestion: Run git commands from the target directory directly instead of using `git -C`.

\\bgit\\b.*\\$\\(cat\\b.suggestion: Pass arguments directly (e.g., `-m "message"`) instead of using `$(cat <<'EOF' ...)`.

\\bgh\\b.*\\$\\(cat\\b.suggestion: Pass arguments directly (e.g., `--title "title" --body "body"`) instead of using `$(cat <<'EOF' ...)`.
